docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,016.00 FILED BY SCHUMAN ROBERT L BALISTRERI SALVATORE J AS TO DEFENDANT PULLI DENNIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-1991 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PULLI DENNIS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHUMAN ROBERT L BALISTRERI SALVATORE J RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PULLI DENNIS $3,016.00 PRINCIPAL, $23.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,039.00, SEE ATTACHED FOR DETAILS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR SCHUMAN ROBERT L BALISTRERI SALVATORE J ASSIGNED TO CREDIT BUREAU OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, INC.
